summary: Solid implementation with good separation of concerns and correct glob/priority logic. YAML workflow follows GitHub Actions conventions (pinned actions, least-privilege, job dependencies). PowerShell script uses CmdletBinding, parameter validation, and explicit error handling. Minor issues: (1) Assign-PrLabels.ps1 lacks Set-StrictMode and top-level -ErrorAction Stop (best practice for production); (2) glob regex is hand-rolled with multi-step escaping that, while correct for common cases (**, *, ?), could be fragile for unusual patterns; (3) workflow output parsing (markers LABELS_START/END) creates implicit coupling to script's Write-Host calls. No duplication detected. Would ship with those minor hardening fixes.
